title.en: Mombasa Port Fastener Supplier: East Africa Gateway Hardware from China
title.zh: 蒙巴萨港紧固件供应商：来自中国的东非门户五金

description.en: Mombasa port fastener supplier serving all of East Africa. Factory-direct construction hardware shipped from China. Distribution to Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, and South Sudan. KEBS certified products available.
description.zh: 蒙巴萨港紧固件供应商，服务整个东非。从中国发运的工厂直供建筑五金。分销到肯尼亚、乌干达、坦桑尼亚、卢旺达和南苏丹。可提供KEBS认证产品。

keywords: Mombasa fastener supplier, East Africa hardware, Kenya port fasteners, Uganda fastener distributor, Tanzania hardware import, Rwanda construction materials, South Sudan hardware supplier, Mombasa port import

heading.en: Mombasa: The Gateway to East Africa's Construction Market
heading.zh: 蒙巴萨：东非建筑市场的门户

body.en: Mombasa port handles over 80% of East Africa's trade and is the primary entry point for construction materials flowing into Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, Burundi, and South Sudan. With East Africa's construction boom accelerating—Kenya at 8.5%, Tanzania at 9.2%, and Uganda at 8.8%—the demand for quality fasteners through Mombasa port has never been higher. TradeGo Fasteners uses Mombasa as our primary East African distribution hub, offering competitive pricing on construction fasteners with efficient clearance and inland transport services. Whether you're a hardware retailer in Nairobi, a contractor in Kampala, or a developer in Dar es Salaam, we deliver quality fasteners to your door.
body.zh: 蒙巴萨港处理超过80%的东非贸易，是建筑材料进入肯尼亚、乌干达、坦桑尼亚、卢旺达、布隆迪和南苏丹的主要入口。随着东非建筑热潮加速——肯尼亚8.5%、坦桑尼亚9.2%、乌干达8.8%——通过蒙巴萨港对优质紧固件的需求前所未有。TradeGo紧固件将蒙巴萨作为我们主要的东非分销中心，以有竞争力的价格为建筑紧固件提供高效的清关和内陆运输服务。无论您是内罗毕的五金零售商、坎帕拉的承包商，还是达累斯萨拉姆的开发商，我们都将优质紧固件送到您的门口。

body.en: From our Mombasa hub, we distribute fasteners throughout East Africa: Kenya (Nairobi, Mombasa, Kisumu, Eldoret, Nakuru - 4-6 hours from port), Uganda (Kampala, Jinja, Gulu - 2-3 days from Mombasa), Tanzania (Dar es Salaam, Arusha, Mwanza - coastal road 4-5 hours), Rwanda (Kigali - transit through Musanze, 2 days), South Sudan (Juba - via Uganda border, 3-4 days), and Burundi (Bujumbura - via Tanzania, 3-4 days).
body.zh: 从我们的蒙巴萨中心，我们向整个东非分销紧固件：肯尼亚（内罗毕、蒙巴萨、基苏木、埃尔多雷特、纳库鲁——距港口4-6小时），乌干达（坎帕拉、金贾、古卢——距蒙巴萨2-3天），坦桑尼亚（达累斯萨拉姆、阿鲁沙、姆万扎——沿海公路4-5小时），卢旺达（基加利——经由穆桑泽中转，2天），南苏丹（朱巴——经乌干达边境，3-4天），布隆迪（布琼布拉——经坦桑尼亚，3-4天）。

heading.zh: 通过蒙巴萨可获得的紧固件

body.en: All our fastener products are available for East African distribution through Mombasa port: roofing fasteners (IBR, corrugated, tile roofs), structural bolts (Grade 8.8, 10.9), self-drilling TEK screws, concrete anchors and wedge anchors, stainless steel fasteners (SS304, SS316), and general hardware kits.
body.zh: 我们所有的紧固件产品都可通过蒙巴萨港进行东非分销：屋顶紧固件（IBR、波纹板、瓦屋顶），结构螺栓（8.8级、10.9级），自钻TEK螺丝，混凝土锚固件和楔形锚固件，不锈钢紧固件（SS304、SS316），以及通用五金套件。

q.en: Can you deliver to Kampala, Uganda?
q.zh: 您可以送到乌干达坎帕拉吗？

a.en: Yes, we deliver throughout Uganda including Kampala, Jinja, Gulu, and other major cities. Transit time is typically 2-3 days from Mombasa port.
a.zh: 是的，我们向乌干达全境发货，包括坎帕拉、金贾、古鲁和其他主要城市。运输时间通常为距蒙巴萨港2-3天。

q.en: What certifications do your Kenya products have?
q.zh: 您的肯尼亚产品有什么认证？

a.en: Our Kenya products are KEBS certified and we provide all necessary documentation for clearance at Mombasa port.
a.zh: 我们的肯尼亚产品已获得KEBS认证，我们提供蒙巴萨港清关所需的所有必要文件。
